Meta.title: Ager — cut the noise, grow understanding
Meta.description: Ager puts quality back at the centre of the news: Italian civic reporting, link-first, with sources always visible and the reason behind every choice.

Hero.title: Putting quality back at the centre of the news
Hero.body: Ager curates Italian civic news and takes you to the original source. No clickbait, no endless loops: only what genuinely helps you understand.

Values.title: Our values
Values.subtitle: A method — not an algorithm chasing your attention.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.body: We show why you see a story: criteria, score and sources stay verifiable at all times.

authority.title: Authority
authority.body: We give weight to recognised sources and flag the context and reliability of what you read.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.body: Summary, context and depth stay distinct: understand first, then choose how far to go.

curiosity.title: Curiosity
curiosity.body: We widen your view beyond your bubble, never forcing it: the choice stays yours.

How.title: How it works
How.subtitle: Three principles, applied to every story.

linkFirst.title: Link-first
linkFirst.body: We never rewrite articles: we send you to the original publisher. Credit stays with those who do the reporting.

sources.title: Visible sources
sources.body: Every story shows its source and its context. No anonymous or unverifiable content.

whyShown.title: “Why am I seeing this”
whyShown.body: For every story you can see the criteria that selected it. No black box.

Cta.title: Start reading better
Cta.body: Open Ager and try news that's clearer, more transparent and respectful of your time.

Footer.mission: Putting quality back at the centre of the news.

Error.title: Something went wrong
Error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again shortly.
